title: trifolium longipes var. elmeri
intro: Trifolium longipes var. elmeri, also known as Elmer's clover, is a perennial legume plant species native to the Philippines, specifically found in the mountainous regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Elmer's clover include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Elmer's clover can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
